blockingIssues.description: Pipeline resume can reset to step 0 when persisted completed_steps round-trips as nil, causing valid persisted current_step_index to be discarded.
Domain worker is started with start_link in request scope, coupling worker lifecycle to the request process and causing extract failures after start.
Act2.Worker extract handler lacks a wrong-state catch-all, so out-of-order extract calls can crash the GenServer instead of returning a graceful error.
API helper drops server error bodies on non-2xx responses, preventing required specific UI error messages (missing .bropilot / domain worker not started) from surfacing.
Act3 executor does not route :pi mode through real codegen execution, so pi-mode builds report success without real code generation.
Codegen writer does not guard against ../ traversal in generated relative paths, allowing writes outside the intended output subtree.
Project map handlers convert user-controlled route params with String.to_atom/1, creating an atom-exhaustion crash vector.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit atom-safety rule: never call String.to_atom/1 on user-controlled input (route params, query params, request body values); use bounded mapping or existing atoms only.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Blocking findings in m1-regression-and-cross-flows identify String.to_atom/1 usage on route params in lib/bropilot/api/handlers/project.ex (GET/PUT map slot handlers).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow justified skipping of agent-browser and RED-test steps for non-visual refactors, while requiring explicit rationale and equivalent command-line verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Frontend-cleanup and act2-ui-page reviews both reported skill-procedure rigidity mismatches versus practical execution context.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure compliance expectations for API features: require either curl/server verification commands or an explicit documented exception in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Domain-api-endpoints and real-codegen reviews noted missing manual API verification despite API-surface changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document YAML persistence edge case where empty lists may decode as nil with current encode/decode behavior, and note Node 25 + happy-dom localStorage test setup gotcha.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Pipeline-persistence review identified empty-list round-trip persistence hazard; vitest-setup review captured Node 25 happy-dom localStorage workaround need.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update stale factual claims (domain page missing, endpoint counts) so shared architecture context matches current codebase state.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Act2-ui-page review notes domain page now exists; m1-regression-and-cross-flows review notes route count mismatch versus documented count.

rejectedObservations.observation: Multiple reviews independently reported that some workers skipped required manual curl/server verification steps.
Integration-worker should always require adding new tests for every regression-fix task.
